response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and architectures, with strong leadership in project execution and mentoring — but lacks documented German proficiency (only 'Basic' listed), has no explicit mention of UML, architecture design documentation, or formal project management experience, and shows no evidence of client-facing advisory or requirements management in consulting contexts.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with open-source tools and Linux environments
Proven leadership in open-source project development and community mentoring
Strong track record in technical innovation and cross-domain system design
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic', falling short of required C1 level
No explicit evidence of UML, architectural modeling, or IT security/compliance expertise
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, requirements management, or IT consulting delivery
